name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning at {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Quick check-in before the chairs fill up. A few new patients reached out yesterday, and there's some movement on the books worth a glance when you have a coffee in hand.

Nothing urgent — just wanted you to walk in with the picture already in your head. We'll keep things smooth on our end.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
